UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAW, WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VO, NGAY VAN NGUYEN, WHITNEY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 359 HYDE STREET, #607, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
